title: Admitted Students
description: What you need to be prepared for attending Duke Kunshan university, follow this to find out what you should do to study in China.
text:
Admitted Students
Congratulations!
Welcome to Duke Kunshan University! We are extremely excited to have you with us. On this page you will find all the information that you will need to be prepared for attending Duke Kunshan this fall. Below, you can find forms and information pertinent to all admitted students, and follow the links at the bottom of the page for information relevant to your specific program. We look forward to seeing you soon!
Information for Admitted Students
Academic Calendar
Passport and Visa Instructions
Duke Kunshan University Net ID Information
Laptop Requirements
Pre-Arrival and Arrival
